name: Paddy (Rice)
rotationAdvice: Excellent rotation after Legumes (like Green Gram) to restore Nitrogen levels.
fertilizerGuide: N:P:K ratio 120:60:60 kg/ha in 3 split doses.

name: Wheat
rotationAdvice: Rotate with Soybeans, Cotton, or Sugarcane to maintain soil organic carbon.
fertilizerGuide: N:P:K ratio 120:50:40 kg/ha. Apply first irrigation at CRI stage (21 days).

name: Cotton
rotationAdvice: Do not repeat cotton back-to-back. Follow with Groundnut or Wheat to disrupt pest cycles.
fertilizerGuide: N:P:K ratio 100:50:50 kg/ha. Micronutrient spray of Zinc & Boron recommended.

name: Maize (Corn)
rotationAdvice: Excellent preceding crop for Mustard or Potato. Enhances soil structure.
fertilizerGuide: N:P:K ratio 120:60:40 kg/ha. Nitrogen split-application at knee-high and tasseling stages.

name: Chilli
rotationAdvice: Rotate with Maize or Sorghum. Avoid other solanaceous crops like Potato or Tomato.
fertilizerGuide: N:P:K ratio 150:60:60 kg/ha. Supplement with organic neem cake to deter root nematodes.

name: Groundnut
rotationAdvice: Fixes atmospheric Nitrogen! Follow with exhausting crops like Maize, Wheat, or Sorghum.
fertilizerGuide: N:P:K ratio 25:50:50 kg/ha (low N needed due to nodulation). Gypsum at pegging stage is critical.
